worker_diagnostic.first_failure: conflict: contextual chunk span does not match its source body
worker_diagnostic.log_recovery: The failed relative proof path placed these logs under the pinned official checkout. Exact copies are appended under DIAGNOSTIC-WORKER-LOGS before that temporary path is discarded.

root_causes: Both contextual chunkers trimmed the stored chunk body while retaining the untrimmed source byte span, violating exact citation reconstruction for sources with edge whitespace.
Worker drain treated a zero-completion tick as an empty queue even when failed jobs were delayed and queued for retry.
Relative campaign output paths were interpreted from the official harness working directory, misplacing official and worker proof artifacts.
